# APPIUM E2E Tests

====================
WebdriverIO
![ts](https://badgen.net/badge/Built%20With/TypeScript/blue)

## Prerequisites

- Node version 16 or higher
- Code Editor

## Initial setup

```
## clone this repo to a local directory
git clone <https://<your-username>@bitbucket.org/conversationhealth/cmp-automation-cy.git>

## install Android studio
Create a device with name: Pixel_3a_API_34_extension_level_7_arm64-v8a

## install the node_modules
npm install

## install global the appium
npm i --location=global appium

## Install xcuitest for the appium
appium driver install --source=npm appium-xcuitest-driver

## Install uiautomator2 for the appium
appium driver install uiautomator2

```

## Executing the tests
1. Open the android studio - Pixel_3a_API_34_extension_level_7_arm64-v8a
2. Android: Run comand in the Terminal: npm run android.app

## POC
- Bao Dao
